reviews.review_text: We had a cabin it was spacious and very clean,  with everything you need for a great stay. We had a small problem which was fixed no problem 😊
Very good place to stay

As I can’t reply I edit my previous post. How am I gonna go there if I’m not from Tasmania? Quite difficult to go and talk to you, you don’t even have common sense. Because you have all my details so the same day as soon as the AirPods where found instead of let me know someone from there started using them and if I check is still happening, it’s so embarrassing. Great customer service!

Regarding my partner review, from Diego Saldarini. I want to clarify that the booking was under my name. I didn’t mention this earlier because I realized it after about my airpods, and nobody informed me or reached out to me about it at the time.
That said, the communication was very poor. If there had been any issue, I would have expected someone to contact me directly instead of me finding out after the fact. Either the mangment or the people who is in charge of cleaning are the dishonest one because I can still see how someone from the complex are using them.

Endroit calme et agréable. Accueil impeccable. Quel plaisir d'avoir des sanitaires propres, bien éclairés, de l'eau chaude.
Merci

My stay at Bicheno East Coast Holiday Park was average at best. Rooms had a strong musty smell like they hadn’t aired out properly, and there were long waits for amenities since there aren’t enough facilities for the number of guests, but nothing major to complain about there.
The real issue.. I accidentally left my headphones in the unit. Days later, I spotted staff using them daily around the park, yet they never contacted me to return them. Complete radio silence and ghosting when I followed up. Awful service.
Avoid unless you’re okay with potential headaches. Better options exist nearby on Tasmania’s east coast. What a shame.

Reception service hours for checkin is 3-6pm. We arrived at 5:25 and the reception is closed. We called, only voice mail available. After 10 minutes, a man opened the door and help checkin. The apartment is fine but not so clean, Amenities are old but working.
Great location, tidy cabins, close to everything. Very happy.
We stayed at Cabin 06 and the kitchen light was flashing. Other than that it was perfect
I booked 2 bedroom unit and found it very nice. I enjoyed my stay very much. Recommended!
The environment holiday park is very comfortable and the staff is very kind.

We arrived early but cabin was ready and the friendly receptionist checked us in.||I patted Thomas the dog while she worked on the computer.||The camp ground is walking distance to the town shops and has a walk way from the back.||Parking by our Cabin No1 which was next to the camp kitchen but was very quiet.||The cabin was very clean but a little dated. Kitchen was good, bed was very comfortable. Air conditioning and heaters. Bathroom was a little tight. Sofa and TV, dining table and chairs.||All in all very good value for the price.

The park is well appointed with a great camp kitchen and relaxation area. The staff were so helpful when I needed a little extra support. I would highly recommend the park if you are staying at Bicheno.

Great caravan park, fantastic location, you can walk to everything you need, really nice vibe and very friendly and helpful staff, everything was easy, no problem 😊
Will definitely come back sometime
Very old place
Quiet little site for camper vans and fixed units. Comfortable enough for a short break . Major benefit is the location near the beach and shops. No pool .
We stayed in a cabin - fortunately for just one night. It was at the lower end of the range of holiday park cabins. Other than comfortable beds, the fit-out was dated and dreary.

We’re usually free camper but had great time.  Clean and updated amenities. Fantastic shower.  Young girl cleaning does great job right down to wiping outside of doors and handles.    Great couple at front desk and friendly.  Walking distance from all shops. Clean camp kitchen.  Large sites.  Definitely would visit again

Stayed in a small cabin, double bed and 4 bunk beds, that could accommodate 6 people. Fridge freezer and decent oven with cook top. Small television and separate bathroom / shower. Bit cramped, and cabin could have done with a bit of a clean. When sweeping the living space at night it became clear that under the sofa had not been swept in ages, and there were ants in the kettle, which was not ideal. Great central location, close to the Main Street and the beach.  Very cheap as well. Mixture of cabins and sites available.

The photos on the website clearly took them in one of the nice newer cabins, we got put in number 3...

It was dated and not as clean as we would have liked. The sofa had mystery stains and after seeing if the underside of the cushions were nicer I had to take a spider out and a large clump of someone else's hair. After that we used the spare bedding to cover them...

The beds were clean, the room with all the bunks was not traditional mattresses, no springs in them and warped so you rolled into the middle, the other single beds were just thin foam, if you were any kind of decent weight you'd be sleeping on the wood.

The bathroom was clean, but the extractor fan didn't work and the shower tray is cracked which is letting water into the wood somewhere causing a damn smell. The door didn't lock. The pressure in the shower was really good at least!

Glad it wasn't a hot day since there is just one outdated ac unit in the main room.

Again. Maybe the other cabins are nicer, this one was not.

Great location in the middle of Bicheno. We had a powered site for 3 nights, it was alittle busy over the holiday period and the kitchens would get very busy if you didn't get in early. Our parking spot wasn't quite level and the rental camper we had didn't have leveling blocks.
Great walking distance to anything Bicheno, the blow hole, icrecream shop, pe guide tours, beach etc.
There is a small playground here for young kids, the showers and toilet facilities are good but could probably ly do with more frequent cleaning.
Overall, great place to stay.
Great little caravan park; prime location, cheap, good amenities, happy days

Good for an overnight stay and conveniently located close to grocery shop. Service and facilities are basic, but adequate. Our cabin was close to the main road, but fortunately there was not a lot of traffice so noise was not an issue.
Excellent location
Easy after hour check in. Room is spacious and very affordable. We had a comfortable stay even for just 1 night.
Location is excellent, IGA supermarket, cafe nearby, 2 mins walk only.
Good location to the beach to sight penguins and walking distance to blowhole. Nice cafes nearby too.
Bunks beds are small not suited for an adult
Nice place and convenient to stay at Bicheno . Late arrival if needed, calling to reception early that day :]
Pretty average cabin - in need of a facelift
good close to food gooiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiidddddddddd
Thé location is very good. Just the wifi doesn’t work.
服務一般，必須當天打電話才能確認，不允許Email書信討論。

Two night stay at Bicheno East Coast Holiday Park in a one bed cabin. Friendly check-in experience.||Very much a cabin; pretty old with well-worn furnishings, but it was clean enough (although I don’t think the rug in the living area had seen a vacuum cleaner for quite some time). WiFi wasn’t great.
Clean & comfortable. Recommended!

Two night stay at Bicheno East Coast Holiday Park in a one bed cabin. Friendly check-in experience.

Very much a cabin; pretty old with well-worn furnishings, but it was clean enough (although I don’t think the rug in the living area had seen a vacuum cleaner for quite some time). WiFi wasn’t great.
It is a nice experience

Great little location. Neat and clean rooms with everything we could need and more.
Definitely glad we chose to stay there.
Walking distance to bakery, supermarket, Cafe very good location

The rooms were nice. Location is great. close to the beach and shops. Unfortunately wasn't given the wifi access which is a really inconvenient. Other then that great spot! Definitely recommend getting onto them about the wifi as soon as you arrive though.✌️
自助check in方便快捷， 地點非常方便， 附近有很多食肆 ，雖然是住在營地但感覺上安全晚上也不嘈吵 ，郊區晚上很凍， 還好房間暖氣很足，廁所有很強的暖燈 ，所以洗澡時也不會覺得很冷

Great place to stay. Beach one block away. Nice coffee shops around. The showers are outstanding. Perfectly clean, lots of room, nice hot and pressure hot. Totally refreshing. Price was great too, $50 one night motorhome 4 adults.
Cabin was in a great location, it would benefit from a tidy up and some minor maintenance issues tended to

This was a great little cabin. Believe  me when I say my wife is fussy and yet she was very complimentary with this accommdation. It was clean, comfortable and compact with great facilities. I wish we could have stayed longer. Next time perhaps.
非常棒的住處，設備齊全、環境優美，性價比很高非常推薦，下次還會來住！
Stayed overnight, better than we expected. Though we stayed in older cabin, it was clean, spacious and had all we needed. Location is great too. For a budget friendly stay, 10/10!

We stayed in a 6 person cabin. The cabin had everything you needed, kitchen, TV, air-conditioning and electric blankets. The beds were fine and the shower was hot. They have seen better days, the couch had collapsed but it was clean and for the money it was good, would stay again.
小鎮， ￼晚上有幾間餐廳可以選擇， ￼有冷暖氣機提供， ￼有小型廚房可以做早餐，有blowhole 景點，超贊

Cabins are in serious need of Maintenance. Mattresses are that hard the floor would be softer to sleep on. The microwave in our cabin was rusted out in the back corner, fly screens on main door were torn, broken toilet cistern, mould in bathroom.
Good location Clean Check in was more difficult than it should have been.

Amazing people who run this place...I would highly recommend it to anyone... very clean, very quiet and the management is awesome.. in fact if you ever want to come to the sunshine Coast..you have our number.. beautiful people ❤️

Cabin was old. Carpet felt like it needed cleaning. There was almost no bench space for food preparation and no storage space (other than the fridge) for food. Entrance door took force to open and close. Bathroom was small and cramped with no hooks for towels. Toilet was intermittently fault - often not stopping when full.Location was fantastic - central and very quiet.
Excellent location and value for money.. beach is 5 minutes walk away and good eating options within walking distance.
Easy check in just get the key from key box and comfortable stay.
place is ok. staff is super nice. recommended to stay here. thanks

In the heart of Bicheno
Right price
Good experience and well located.
Amazing site!

We only stayed for one night in a 2-bedroom cabin. Check in was very quick and easy. Staff were friendly. Perfect for what we needed. Close to town- can walk to the shops. Electric blanket on one of the beds. Fully equipped kitchen although we didn't use it.
Nice cabin.

雖然設備有些歲月痕跡，但一切都可正常使用
廚具設備齊全，房內床疊乾淨柔軟，距離景點非常近
過個馬路就可到海邊，個人推薦住宿地點
2 small bedrooms. Small cabin and near to restaurant and penguin tour.

You get what you pay for and for this price, you can’t expect anything but a decent accommodation to stay at. And this place is pretty decent - clean place and sheets (not the best mattress nor couch) with just enough space to move around and a kitchen. Make sure to bring your own toiletries and some cleaners (sponges, chux, etc.), however, if you plan to cook/eat in the cabin. Unreliable wifi so better get data if you need it. Great location though as we just walked to the whaler’s lookout trail and there’s an IGA store just across the street as well.
We stayed in a one bedroom cottage which was comfortable. The location was great. One supermarket is just nearby.
Clean cabin in a good location. Good facilities.  Good value for money.
小木屋空間不大但也不擁擠，備品、廚房用具都有提供，適合家人朋友旅遊，cp值高

We booked a powered site and made use of their bathroom and laundry facilities. All very clean. The showers were really good. A mate had a cabin which was user friendly and had all the basics you'd need for a self-contained holiday cabin.
Close to the main shops and sights.
Definitely recommend!
Absolutely Excellent
The cabin at the holiday park was clean, private and quiet. With a car, it was easy to enjoy the local attractions of coastline and town, for example, The Lobster Shack.
設備齊全，房舍空間足夠

Perfect place to stay. It's within walking distance of the beaches and eateries. A bonus was the individual amenities - it felt like you had your own ensuite. They were immaculately clean as well. Kudos to the owners. A return visit is a definite.
非常乾淨的住宿，地點位置也很好，對面有超市，離景點也很近。
It was a short stay for one night. It’s good overall,  can see starry night. It took us some time to figure out how to use the oven.

I really enjoyed my short stay here. The rooms were comfortable and we had cooking facilities. The later was useful as we struggled to find a restaurant for the night.

Fairly peaceful. Happy to stay again.

Rooms are nice but could do with a really good clean. They have been put together very quickly and the cheapest beds could do with a softer mattress. Pet friendly which is awesome. The park location is really good great for walking distance everywhere.
The park is tidy, neat and clean. Could do with a bit more lighting as it is very dark
Overall would stay again for a 2 or 3 day weekend
Friendly, fast check in, clean, walk to shops and coast cabins are very spacious, air conditioning/heating
Excellent place to stay and right next door to the Bicheno Penguin Tours.

We were given cabin 12,  and having not stayed here at Bicheno previously, but at Coles Bay in 2024 we did not know what to expect.|We are in our 70's and did not expect the Taj Mahal but do expect electric blankets that work on both sides when it's cold, no mould in the bathroom sink, a stove that has been cleaned of grease along the sides, as well as the exhaust fan and the light above the stove to also be working and clean.|No comfortable seating  only an L shaped uncomfortable bench couch and 2 plastic chairs. Their site shows many other configurations and this was what we were working with when we booked.|We booked well in advance and are not travelling with a dog, but were given this fenced in pet friendly cabin. Not happy,|We are from SA and have travelled extensively in all mainland states over the last 50+ years, and this is our 3rd trip to Tassie. |Will not stay here again, and would have happily paid a bit more for a more comfortable cabin.
Staff were lovely. Excellent location. Quiet rooms. Very clean.

Cabin well appointed, cosy, clean, comfortable with a quality heat pump (essential for cool Tassie autumn evenings).
Also appreciate the quality bathroom toiletries.

It's a caravan park. Lots of vans , clean tidy, quiet but lots of people close together. Laundry doesn't have info for the township like most parks do. Most laundries have tourist information and they leave books but none of this. Although it has the essential washing machines,,dryers irons and ironing boards.
Highly recommend
Communal toilets were very clean. Location was great. Rv spot was lovely. Cabins were slightly dated. Good stay.
I enjoyed it. Good location and facilities.  My one night included travelling bikies arguing amongst themselves after a few too many.  Was good entertainment
Bicheno is a very scenic town, the holiday park was nice, clean, friendly staff

This review is for caravan/ campervan pitches only….Firstly the 4 stars for “ rooms” was given because some of the sites for caravans were on a bit of a slope but not excessive but in fairness I deducted a star.
We stayed here for 2 nights, we had a level pitch and it couldn’t have been better…. We didn’t use camp kitchen or lounge area but it looked good… we did use camp showers toilets and laundry…. all very good and clean …. The cabins looked good but can’t comment on those.
Great location easy walk to shops.
It's ok, but the wifi mostly doesn't work, you have enough pace in the apartments, it's only a 2 minute walk to the beach. You have the possibility to cook and wash your clothes here.

Could do with some more modern amenities.
More showers to prevent regular queuing and more accessible kitchens with hot water would have been welcome.
房間舒適，地點方便，可以泊車。
位置近海灘,單位設施齊備, 環境優美, 地方整潔
Poor WiFi
Good place to stay .

Stayed 1 nite in a 1 bed cabin & loved the cabin . Plenty of room , spotlessly clean , good aircon, please to stay there . Great value for money. Shops are directly across the road , hotel is 10 metres up the road heading north . Would definitely recommend this caravan park

Liz was very friendly in the office. Park is clean and tidy. Cabin is clean and tidy. Good water pressure
Internet never worked, so make sure you have your own data
Would stay here again. Good value for money
Recently stayed 2 nights here we were happy with everything and hopefully one day will be a returning customer
Great cabins!! This place has a wonderful feel to it too with kids and adults alike hanging out.

As far as caravan parks go, this one is pretty bloody average. At check-in the receptionist couldn’t give two hoots so long as I gave them my credit card and then it was silence and back to their screen, no friendly welcome and rather awkward. This sums up the park, it’s a great location, they know it but in dire need of renovation and care.
I’m so glad I didn’t have my caravan as the sites looked more akin to the potholed footy carpark than something you’d want to try and get a van parked level on.
We had a two bedroom apartment and I guess a clean room is an additional option we’d forgot to pay for. Upon arrival the bins in the room still had rubbish in them and the couch (if you could call it one as it was more like a sheet draped over timber) had food scraps sticking up from between the cushions.
As for facilities we found two of the three washing machines broken and most of the games room was out of order. The kids playground is obsolete, worn out and not working properly - like the flying fox which was very hard for the kids to get flying.
Sadly the only thing going for this park is its location, close to shops and the beach

The park is fairly basic but meets the essential needs for a short stay. The facilities are functional, though some areas could benefit from a little updating. The staff is friendly and helpful, and the location is convenient, with easy access to nearby attractions. The park is clean, but there isn’t much in terms of amenities or activities, so it’s best suited for those looking for a simple, no-frills experience. Overall, it’s a decent option for an overnight stop or a budget-friendly stay.
Wifi was very bad.
Laundry was terrible.
Very nice facilities, campground is tidy and cosy and feels a bit like a neighborhood.

No other accommodation available in all of Bicheno so we grabbed the last cabin at this caravan park.  We stayed in the budget cabin and although there were only two of us, this cabin slept four.  It was very dated and a bit sad.  In saying that, the cabin was clean and quite large in the main area.  Bathroom was small and old but functional and water was hot.  When you turned the light on the fan made a dreadful noise.  Kitchen was adequate and had all you needed.  Bed was comfortable.  Sofa was a bit low but would be no problem for younger people.  I was a bit worried when I discovered the window didn’t lock, or at least I couldn’t lock it and the lock on the main door was a bit loose.  Parking is right outside the cabin undercover.  Everything is within walking distance which is great.  Only downside is the WIFI.  Virtually non existent.  We thought we could connect but it was literally only for a second and then dropped out altogether.  It really was a nuisance.  Not sure if it was the general area or the park’s WIFI system.  I could connect to my own data plan thank goodness.  If it was just the park’s system they need to do something about it.  In this day and age it is a requirement.  All in all, the budget cabins are adequate, reasonably priced and the park is very well situated.
I'm the centre of town. No complaints.
Basically no WiFi service

We had a school group of 24 boys stay here for the last two nights and it was an excellent experience. Great location, great facilities and friendly staff. Would recommend and we will be back!
From all staff and students at St Joe’s.

Excellent Service with caring heart!
From Staff and Students of St. Joseph’s College.
This place is a must we love staying here A+++
Great holiday park. Good price. Perfect location. All in a beautiful town
Good place
The facilities are neatly.

Terrible customer service and poor amenities at this campsite. The cooking facilities were unusable, the laundry came out dirty, and even after drying them twice, they were still damp. Despite these issues, the staff did nothing to address the problems. I highly recommend avoiding this place.

We stayed at this campsite for one night in an unpowered site and unfortunately, it was by far the worst experience we've had while traveling around Australia by car. This was also the most expensive campsite we've paid for on our entire trip, and we regret it entirely.

First, the kitchen facilities were a joke. They had only one pan that actually worked with the hob—because it had to be a special one. Trying to cook anything, like boiling pasta, became an ordeal. Imagine trying to use a frying pan for that—needless to say, it took forever and was incredibly frustrating.

Then, we used the washing machine, and the clothes came out absolutely disgusting—dirty and smelling awful. I complained, but they did nothing to resolve the issue. We had to dry our clothes twice, and even then, they were still wet.

I tried to reach out via email to address the issue, but they completely ignored me. When I called to follow up, they knew about the email. Still, they didn’t do anything, just giving excuses.

Between the pathetic facilities, lack of response, and overall poor service, this place was a huge disappointment. Do yourself a favor and stay at the campsite next door. This place is horrible, and I would not recommend it to anyone.
Central to Bicheno. We had a powered site for our motor home. Loved the heat lamp in the showers and that there was no additional cost for paying guests
Good location, close to beach and local IGA. Nice little cabin can fit 6 ppl.

No hot water in ladies shower . Very dated  bathrooms. in need of some money put back into it.
Convenient location for stop over. Close to everything.
We had a powered site with a camper.

Only minor criticism is the size of the TV, whose format didn't allow for hi-def channels and not all channels were available. Having said that, the rooms are compact so not a lot of spare wall space for a large TV.

Otherwise, great location, pizza restaurant over the back fence, accessible via a gateway, sold wood-fired pizzas that are very tasty. 100 metres walk to the beach.

Fantastic facility’s!
We stayed at a powered site in a camper van and used the shared bathrooms and they were great. Water was hot instantly, nice wide shower heads, big mirrors and HEATED BULBS to warm the room with an automatic extraction fan. The fella manning the reception was also very helpful so after a not so great experience elsewhere, this was a blessing.
Stayed there for one night and it was great. Nice camp site, modern bathrooms, fast internet and close to the beach. Would stay here again.
Très bon accueil
In town and near tourist attractions. Very convenient and comfortable place to stay
位置環境不錯，鄰近參加睇企鵝團，WiFi 需要改善，接收質素差
We arrived late, so got the key from the box. The surrounding was very dark and no chance to look around or use the facilities.
Very friendly owner. Close to the ferry
Everything was good, full equipped. Early check in is allowed and easy check out too.
Very good
facilities are old but still work. Good location with supermarket nearby.
Great park to stay Cabin was spotless and location across the road from beach and shops  was perfect Great hosts and a very friendly little town You do tassie proud .

We were eager to travel across Tas with our kids in a Campervan so I've called to book a site for our family trip, the person on the phone was so rude, I didn't understand ONE question, so I asked to please repeat it again (as English is not my first language) and he hang up the phone I try to call again to check if it was an accident, but he didn't take the call... Not feeling well staying in a place like that.. really sorry about that experience with tourist people..

To begin withz the unpowered sites here are just a piece of grass in between cabins and caravans, they are one next to the other, they are small and you can't fit your car and tent in all of them. The ground levek is terrible in some and just acceptable in others. We paid for an unpowered site. There were plenty of sites available when we got there, but the lady from reception insisted that they were booked and the only one free for us was a site with the ground completely  uneven. We asked if she could give us a site with a good ground levelling since we camp with a tent, and for caravans and roof top tent campers, the ground level wouldn't make such a difference.  But she wouldn't even try to help. So we were left with a terrible site, and, as we predicted, the free sites were used by people with caravans.

Bathrooms and showers are clean.
Camp kitchen is big, but there are hardly enough appliances for all the campers and backpackers here.

Terrible place to stay but sadly the only one where showers are free. They won't even tell you there is another caravan park in the town  when they are fully booked
A basic park but close to everything. The amenities are clean and have good showers. Bicheno is a lovely town with great beaches
地點鄰近海灘及超市，十分方便。小屋內廚具齊備，有焗爐 電爐 電水煲。買食材及調味料便可煮食。房內有電氊，可惜只得一張能正常運作。整體滿意，下次會再來。

$40 powered site for a caravan.  Excellent shower/toilet cubbies... all in one and great water pressure and hot!

Short walk to everything in Bicheno including the Whaler's Lookout which should not be missed if in town... easy walk ( not stroller friendly, some rocky stairs), but views over town and the Gulch are worth the climb.

Short walk to swim at Waub's Bay.

Service was great and check in was very easy. We weren’t given a map of the park though. Most likely because our site was near reception and the amenities.

In our opinion, the amenities could do with a renovation. They felt run down, old and as if they hadn’t been cleaned properly. The showers were either way to hot or way to cold. There seemed to be no in between setting.

We used the camp kitchen once to clean our dishes and never returned (we were there for 5 nights). It seemed as though the kitchen hadn’t been cleaned properly which made us feel uncomfortable cleaning there.

The beach and shops are a brief walk away.
Good to see investment back into Park facilities. 👍
非常感謝櫃臺人員耐心地等侯！,服務非常貼心的~各方面都不錯！只有一項需改進：客廳有2張餐桌上椅子需更換~~椅面角邊已經破損了！我被刺到了發~趕快更換，已免他人繼續受傷另住宿地點離Bichno  blowhole很近！值得一遊

Great location, very kid friendly.
If your relying on the camp kitchen to do your cooking, think again, really poor on this account, otherwise very good.
Very convenient place as it’s right middle of the town yet quiet at night and safe place. Walking distance to the beach, blow hole, supermarket and restaurant.

We stayed only one night in a tent. Perfect location in the middle of the town, clean place, hot shower and equipped kitchen. Children playground right next to us and nice beach very close to the campsite. A lot to do around. Would reccomand to stay to everyone.

It was sufficient for our 2 night stay though we stayed in nicer holiday parks during our trip. This one needs a little bit of modernisation and seemed rather basic and lacking comforts e.g. No cushions on sofa, only 1 pillow each on bed. The bedroom was also very small. Not enough room around the bed for both our backpacks. Also no space for night tables and the little shelf provided was too small to hold much except a phone and water bottle.
The location is excellent, everything in Bicheno is walkable in 10min. However, the site was very crowded. It seemed like a couple were camping on our patio they were so close.
We didn't use the shared kitchen and most of the washing machines/dryers were out of order so we used a nearby laundrette instead. The kitchenette in the cabin had a microwave, kettle and fridge.

The cabin accommodated our needs perfectly. It was a great find for what we had planned. We really appreciated the fact that all the amenities were available on a very rainy day. We could watch Netflix and Prime. Close to Freycinet National Park. There's a well maintained BBQ area. The cabin we stayed in had an enclosed area, so you could have a dog and small children within view. Dog friendly site but you need to hope visitors bring friendly dogs. Reception was warm and friendly on arrival. Truly a prize find during a peak holiday period.

The room I stayed in was ok but the door barely locked. I think if I shoved a paddle pop stick in the lock I could break in. The room is very outdated and old but I cold still live after (barely) overall it was ok for one night.
Great spot to stay, clean amenities. Plenty of camp site to suit all types of campers.. very well priced..

Great Campground for that price. Paid 35$ for an unpowered site for one night, new and very clean toilet and shower rooms (unlimited nice hot showers included!), laundry available and basic camp kitchen with bbq area.
Stunning bay for a swim just few walking minutes away, cute little coffee shops and delicious fish& chips around the corner. 😊 just enjoyed our time in Bicheno.
special experience staying here.
Idea budget accommodation in the heart of Bicheno, walking distance to the beach and all the shops. The cabins are clean and well appointed. Definitely recommend.

Okay caravan park. If you plan on staying on an unpowered "site" you can expect the worst spot for a van we've ever experienced. Not even sites, they just painted lines on the curb and made spots out of the dirt, uneven boulevard. Not enough space for 2 vans next to each other to even have awnings open. Also paid $5 for the dryer that left clothes barely more dry than when we put them in (no we didn't overload it). Bbqs are also $1. If it wasn't for the showers and decent camp kitchen it would have been a total waste of money. Extremely exposed to the wind and cramped.

Bardzo fajne miejsce. Kuchnia dobrze wyposażona, salon z kanapa. Sypialnia nie miała ogrzewania (było w salonie podwójne) ale za to były kocyki elektryczne pod prześcieradłem ;) bardzo fajne rozwiązanie ;) miejsce na auto pod domkiem. Okolica bardzo przyjemna. Było też miejsce na zewnątrz (wspólne) do jedzenia. Internet w domku dość słaby trzeba było wyjść na zewnątrz żeby lepiej działał. Personel miły ;) miejsce warte polecenia ;)

The cabin we were in was very clean well set out and quiet
Easy access to main road and eateries
Friendly staff, great amenities clean and tidy , situated right in town so short walk to everything
Even though we arrived late, they took care of us and helped us. Rooms are clean and comfortable, good location
Spacious cabin with easy excess to town. Lots of beautiful view of the sea. Enjoy the surrounding of clean garden.

Service was great but unfortunately the park is not. The bathrooms and laundry need serious work. The hot water is intermittent resulting in a mostly cold shower. The bathrooms are grotty and don’t appear to have been properly cleaned in quite a while as is the laundry with the top dryer not drying at all despite taking the money.
The sites are close together, windy and exposed which makes it an altogether unpleasant stay.
Unfortunately this is the only option available in Bicheno but you’d be better off avoiding this park completely
Great location but needs a bit of TLC
Great stay for overnight.There are few restaurants nearby.
Such a lovely park. We had a powered site and the facilities were great, very happy we stayed here on our way to Bay of Fires
It's sad when insurance policies dictate the rules everywhere, welcome to a world in fear of the worst case all the time :(
